color-no-hex.message: No hex values. Use a token from tokens.css (see CLAUDE.md).

rules.declaration-property-value-disallowed-li: Use logical properties for RTL: margin-inline-start / padding-inline-end / inset-inline-start / text-align: start.

_notes.why: These two rules catch the two most expensive mistakes:
_notes.1: Hardcoded hex values break the approved palette and cannot be themed.
_notes.2: left/right CSS breaks the Arabic RTL layout and is a rewrite to fix later.
_notes.tailwind: Also ban ml- mr- pl- pr- left- right- in eslint or code review. Use ms- me- ps- pe- start- end-.
